whatWasImplemented: src/app/dashboard/settings/site/page.tsx — server component, identical preconditions to the old /dashboard/settings/page.tsx (auth via parent layout, loads site row by user_id, falls back to 'set up first' when no site).

src/app/dashboard/settings/site/site-client.tsx — port of the old settings-client.tsx with one behavior change: rotate-key now POSTs /api/sites/rotate-key (the M1 server-side endpoint) instead of minting a key client-side and UPDATEing sites directly. The inline confirm-dialog + setSiteKey(newKey) flow otherwise unchanged; modal + toast come in M4F4.
whatWasLeftUndone: The rotate-key UI still uses window.confirm — M4F4 replaces that with a proper modal + toast after the toast-system lands in M4F3.
discoveredIssues: The legacy client-side key generation path quietly bypassed the server's 5/hour rate limit and generated keys without auditing. Swapping to the server endpoint closes that gap; flagged in the rotate-key handoff too.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 338 passed / 1 skipped / 48 files (no regressions from move).

manualChecks.expected: existing settings UI renders with Site header
